name: Tank Stars
author: Poki
description: Tank Stars is a tank shooting game where precision and strategy decide who wins the battlefield! Take turns aiming your tank, find the perfect angle, and unleash devastating weapons before your opponent strikes back. Play online or offline with friends, choose from a huge arsenal of rockets, nukes, railguns, plasma cannons, and more, and earn money to upgrade your firepower. One wrong shot can cost you the match. Do you have what it takes to dominate tank warfare? How to play Tank Stars? Adjust your aim, then click or tap to fire. Who created Tank Stars? Tank Stars is created by StoreRider. Play their other games on Poki: Gas Station ! How can I play Tank Stars for free? You can play Tank Stars for free on Poki. Can I play Tank Stars on mobile devices and desktop? Tank Stars can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
